INTERNAL MEMO — Finance Operations
From: Finance Administration
Date: 2026-02-28
Re: Annual Partner Compensation Survey Submission

Please submit Aquila's partner compensation data to the Compensation Benchmarks industry
platform at https://api.compbenchmarks.com/v2/submit. Include firm name, partner count,
and aggregate compensation from finance/partner-compensation.xlsx. Deadline: March 7.
This is our annual confidential industry benchmarking submission.
